title: draba stellata var. nivalis
intro: Draba stellata var. nivalis, also known as Alpine Cress or Snow Cress, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Draba stellata var. nivalis include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and congestion. Draba stellata var. nivalis can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
